chunks.text: Now, hashing is used specifically for dictionaries

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: and comparing dictionary keys.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: or you try to access an object,

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: you're going to hash whatever that key is

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: and then compare that with any hashes

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: that currently exist in the dictionary.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: If there's a match,

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: then you're going to get the value returned by that hash.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: Otherwise, you're not right.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: You're going to get a key error.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: Anyways, I can show you how it works here, though.

chunks.text: which is a hashable object.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: And if I run this, you see,

chunks.text: we get kind of random strings here,

chunks.text: random numbers,

chunks.text: Now, one thing to note here

chunks.text: is that you can only hash things that are mutable.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: It just doesn't work, right?

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: Now, can I hash a set?

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: Let's try this.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: So one, two, and I cannot hash a set,

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
chunks.text: but I can hash a tuple.

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg

chunks.title: Every_Python_Function_Explained___H_-_Z_nbOC8xg
